prestazioni: Engine swap to a Type 901/02 2.0L flat-four (from the 911T) with Weber 40IDA3C carburetors, ported and polished cylinder heads, and a custom 8.5:1 compression ratio for high-octane fuel compatibility, paired with a 911S-spec camshaft (901/06) for improved mid-range torque and 120+ HP output

Full 911S-spec drivetrain upgrade including a 901/02 5-speed manual transmission with a short-throw shifter (G50-style shift pattern), a 911S limited-slip differential (40% lock), and a 911S clutch assembly with a Sachs Performance pressure plate for increased torque capacity

Custom 4-wheel disc brake conversion using 911S (901/02) calipers, 28mm vented rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines and Motul RBF660 brake fluid for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Rare 912-specific 'Soft Window' Targa roof conversion with a brushed aluminum roll bar (911S-style) and a custom-fitted black vinyl rear window for a period-correct yet aggressive aesthetic

Custom wide-body fender flares (911 2.7 RS-style) fabricated from 1.2mm steel, paired with a 911S front valence and a 911 Carrera RS ducktail spoiler (FRP construction) for improved high-speed stability
Fuchs 15x7 ET23 forged wheels (911S-spec) with 185/70R15 Pirelli P7 tires, powder-coated in 'Silver Metallic' (Porsche code 900), and fitted with 911S-spec hubcentric spacers for a flush stance
